An asteroid impact with kinetic energy around 5.0e14 Joules (approx 500 kilotons). This causes a high-altitude airburst. The primary damage is localized shattered windows and minor structural damage, similar to the Chelyabinsk meteor event in Russia. Planetary survival is guaranteed.
